hero.subtitle: Curriculum, scheduling, behavior tracking, gradebook, and AI-powered insights—all in one unified platform built for 21st-century education.

features.title: Everything your school needs
features.subtitle: Bring 20+ modules into one unified platform designed for modern education

classspark.title: ClassSpark Behavior
classspark.description: Built-in behavior tracking with monster avatars. Real-time points, parent notifications, and gamified engagement.

gradebook.title: Skills-Based Gradebook
gradebook.description: Move beyond letter grades. Track mastery with color-coded heatmaps showing exactly what each student knows.

scheduling.title: Magnetic Scheduling
scheduling.description: AI-powered drag-and-drop timetables. Automatic conflict detection and teacher workload balancing.

aiAssistant.title: TeacherLab & AI
aiAssistant.description: Your all-in-one AI workspace: generate lessons, homework, presentations, and reports with TeacherLab. Present with Teaching Mode.

exams.title: Exam Platform
exams.description: Complete exam lifecycle from creation to AI-assisted marking with confidence scoring and approval workflows.

curriculum.title: Curriculum Planning
curriculum.description: AI-assisted curriculum mapping with skills alignment. Connect standards to assessments seamlessly.

communication.title: Keep your school connected
communication.subtitle: Built-in messaging, video calls, and social features that bring teachers, students, and parents together.

messaging.title: Internal Messaging
messaging.description: Discord-style chat with direct messages, group channels, and file sharing. Keep your school connected.

video.title: Video & Voice Calls
video.description: Built-in Jitsi video conferencing. Start video or voice calls directly from any chat conversation.

materials.title: Materials Sharing
materials.description: Share lesson resources, worksheets, and files directly in chat. Add materials to lesson plans with one click.

stories.title: Class Stories
stories.description: Social media-style updates for classes. Share photos, videos, and achievements with parents and students.

studentParent.title: Engage students, empower parents
studentParent.subtitle: Interactive homework, comprehensive portfolios, and a dedicated parent dashboard keep everyone in the loop.

portfolio.title: Student Portfolio
portfolio.description: Unified portfolio of all student work—homework, classwork, assessments, and projects—with AI and teacher evaluations.

activities.title: 17+ Interactive Activities
activities.description: Audio recording, video submissions, image uploads, matching, fill-in-blank, and more for engaging homework.

parentPortal.title: Parent Portal
parentPortal.description: Dedicated dashboard for parents to view grades, attendance, behavior points, portfolios, and book meetings.

development.title: Professional Development
development.description: Teacher observation rubrics, evaluations, standards tracking, and evidence management for growth.

ai.title: AI that understands education
ai.subtitle: Not just another chatbot. Our AI is trained specifically for educational contexts, understanding curriculum standards, pedagogy, and classroom dynamics.
ai.feature1: Generate lesson plans aligned to your curriculum
ai.feature2: Create differentiated homework in one click
ai.feature4: Produce term reports with AI assistance

howItWorks.title: 3 Steps to Launch

howItWorks.step1Description: Use AI to generate comprehensive lesson plans aligned with your curriculum standards in minutes, not hours.

howItWorks.step3Description: Track behavior with ClassSpark points, monitor skill progress, and keep parents informed in real-time.
